'''''Bloodprice''''' was an [[Imperial Patrol Frigate]] of the [[Grand Imperial Navy]].

==History==
Like its crew, ''Bloodprice'' technically served the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of [[Sector 5/Legends|Sector 5]], but bore allegiance to [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill's]] [[Constitutional Protectorate of Prakith]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], ''Bloodprice''{{'s}} crew included commanding officer [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ors Dogot]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Sojis]] and [[Yeoman/Legends|Yeoman]] [[Cligot]]. Tasked with patrolling the farthest ring of [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith's]] defenses for potential military threats and commercial seizures, ''Bloodprice'' discovered the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]''. Thinking it a ripe target, Captain Dogot ordered a barrage of [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] fire at the ''Teljkon Vagabond'', unaware of its capabilities. In response, the ''Vagabond'' fired upon ''Bloodprice'', sending its ionization reactor critical and destroying the ship in a single fusillade.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}}
